channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: United Football League launches expansion process in hopes of growing from 8 teams
item.description: The United Football League announced on Monday it is looking to expand and has launched the process for it in hopes of growing from eight teams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jim Montgomery is thrilled to be back with the St. Louis Blues as their coach
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As new Blues coach Jim Montgomery appeared before reporters Monday at Madison Square Garden sporting a dark blue sweatshirt emblazoned with the team’s famed blue note logo, there was no hesitation about his emotions.
item.dc:creator: ALLAN KREDA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sharks’ first-round pick reportedly breaks hand, will not play in WJC
item.description: San Jose Sharks prospect reportedly out for IIHF World Junior Championships run from Dec. 26 to Jan. 5 in Ottawa.
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: UCLA moves up to No. 1 in AP Top 25 women's basketball poll for first time in history
item.description: UCLA is the new No. 1 in The Associated Press Top 25 women's basketball poll after a historic win that lifted the school to its first appearance in the top spot.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Inman: 10 things that caught my eye in 49ers’ visit to Green Bay
item.description: Injured starters Brock Purdy, Trent Williams and Nick Bosa are all captains. So are George Kittle, Christian McCaffrey, Kyle Juszczyk, Deebo Samuel and Fred Warner. Kittle is the only one who excelled Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Two US senators urge FIFA not to pick Saudi Arabia as 2034 World Cup host over human rights risks
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — Two United States senators urged FIFA on Monday not to pick Saudi Arabia as the 2034 World Cup host next month in a decision seen as inevitable since last year despite the kingdom’s record on human rights.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Baker Mayfield seeks $12M in lawsuit against father's company
item.description: An ongoing dispute between Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield and his family has boiled over.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: Steve Gleason, former NFL player battling ALS, suffers accident following volleyball clinic
item.description: Former New Orleans Saints safety Steve Gleason suffered an accident exiting his van on Saturday following a volleyball clinic, his wife said in a social media post.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Who's No. 1? No. 2 UConn, No. 5 UCLA and No. 6 Notre Dame all have chance at top spot in AP poll
item.description: A wild weekend in Los Angeles set up for a new No. 1 in The Associated Press women's basketball poll when it's released Monday. The question is who will it be? Defending champion South Carolina has been No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Toronto holds off Utah HC, 3-2
item.description: TORONTO (AP) - Mitch Marner scored twice in a second-period surge as the Toronto Maple Leafs defeated the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 on Sunday night to extend their winning streak to four. The victory, in the lone NHL game on the schedule, came in the first meeting between Toronto and Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Injured Joel Embiid, Paul George watch from the 76ers' bench once again
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — James Harden was about booed out of the arena each time he touched the ball, a sound of contempt not heard in Philly since — well, since Ben Simmons was razzed with much the same vocal voraciousness two nights earlier.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Montrose Red Hawks advances to the next round
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — The Montrose Red Hawks delivered a commanding performance in the third round of the Class 4A playoffs, defeating Mesa Ridge 53-21 on Friday night to secure their spot in the semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Josh Jacobs scores 3 touchdowns as Packers dominate injury-riddled 49ers
item.description: Green Bay Packers running back Josh Jacobs ran for three touchdowns for the first time in two years as the team barreled over the San Francisco 49ers, 38-10
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Seibert misses an extra point late as the Commanders lose their 3rd in a row, 34-26 to the Cowboys
item.description: Austin Seibert choked back tears taking responsibility for missing the extra point that would have tied the score in the final minute. Jeremy Reaves choked back tears blaming himself for a missed assignment that led to a kickoff return touchdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs win at the buzzer again, topping Panthers 30-27 on Shrader's field goal
item.description: Ten yards into a scramble, Patrick Mahomes could have easily slid for a first down or simply ducked out of bounds and moved on to the next play.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Vikings win on walk-off field goal in overtime after blowing late lead, allowing onside kick recovery
item.description: The Vikings squandered a two-touchdown lead in the fourth and allowed an onside kick recovery, but they got the job done with a walk-off field goal in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kennesaw State beats No. 24 Rutgers 79-77 in program's 1st home game against ranked team
item.description: KENNESAW, Ga. (AP) — Jamil Miller had 16 points and 10 rebounds, and Kennesaw State dominated No. 24 Rutgers on Sunday and held on for a 79-77 win in the first home game against a ranked opponent in the program's history.
item.dc:creator: SEAN HOLOHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rico Carty, former Braves star and 1970 NL batting champ, dead at 85
item.description: Atlanta Braves outfielder Rico Carty, who won a batting title and was an All-Star during his career, has died, the team and players' association said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: When Harbaugh brothers meet for 3rd time Monday, Archie Manning can relate to Jack Harbaugh
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Archie Manning can empathize with what Jack Harbaugh will be going through again on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Verstappen still manages to win 4th straight F1 title in one of worst seasons of his Red Bull career
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Max Verstappen won an unbelievable 19 races last season that included an incredible streak of 10 in a row in what would arguably go down as one of the greatest years in Formula 1 history.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Simone Biles' husband, Jonathan Owens, mimics wife's gymnast pose for fumble recovery celebration
item.description: Chicago Bears safety Jonathan Owens paid homage to his wife, Simone Biles, after recovering a fumble that he forced against the Minnesota Vikings.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: St. Louis Blues fire Drew Bannister and hire Jim Montgomery as coach
item.description: Drew Bannister is out as coach of the St. Louis Blues after less than a full calendar year on the job. Jim Montgomery is back behind the bench of an NHL team five days after he was fired by the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Barbra Banda’s goal leads Orlando over Washington 1-0 for NWSL championship. Marta earns title
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Barbra Banda scored in the 37th minute and the Orlando Pride beat the Washington Spirit 1-0 on Saturday night to win their first National Women’s Soccer League championship.
item.dc:creator: AVERY OSEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Barnes leads Aggies to 41-20 win over SDSU
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a rough start to the season, Utah State is finishing strong. Bryson Barnes accounted for 323 yards and four touchdowns to lead Utah State over San Diego State 41-20 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Markkanen scores 34 as Jazz beat Knicks, 121-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Lauri Markkanen had 34 points, Collin Sexton had four 3-pointers in the fourth quarter and the Utah Jazz ran past the New York Knicks 121-106 on Saturday to snap a four-game skid. Sexton finished 25 points and John Collins had 20 points and 13 rebounds forthe Jazz.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Formula 1 expected to expand grid to 11 teams as early as next week for Cadillac to enter in 2026
item.description: Formula 1 is expected to approve grid expansion for an 11th team originally started by Michael Andretti as early as next week, The Associated Press has learned.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Purdy, Bosa out for Green Bay matchup, Allen steps up as QB
item.description: (KRON) – San Francisco 49ers head coach Kyle Shanahan announced in a press conference Friday that quarterback Brock Purdy will be out for Sunday’s game against the Green Bay Packers. Purdy injured his right shoulder in last Sunday's loss to the Seattle Seahawks.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: No ball at Tropicana Field in 2026 after Milton; new ballpark deal dies: Tampa Bay Rays
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council has voted to spend over $23 million to repair Tropicana Field after Hurricane Milton destroyed the roof on the home of the Tampa Bay Rays.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, Fox 5

item.title: Giants release quarterback Daniel Jones just days after benching him
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — The Daniel Jones era in New York is over. The Giants quarterback was granted his release on Friday by the team just days after the franchise said it was benching him in favor of third-stringer Tommy DeVito.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 2024 F1 Las Vegas Grand Prix preview: Racing down the Strip
item.description: The 2024 Formula 1 World Championship heads to Las Vegas this weekend for what will be the third to last race of the season.
item.dc:creator: Viknesh Vijayenthiran - Motor Authority, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James announces he's leaving social media
item.description: LeBron James is taking a break from social media, citing negativity online. The Lakers star posted a screengrab of a post from Rich Kleiman, Kevin Durant's longtime agent, to X, formerly Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KTLA 5

item.title: Hillsborough County man files lawsuit against Netflix over Tyson-Paul fight streaming issues
item.description: A class action lawsuit was filed in Hillsborough County on Monday against Netflix over alleged streaming issues during the fight between legendary brawler Mike Tyson and former YouTuber Jake Paul.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: San Diego Legion to play in new stadium next year
item.description: Snapdragon Stadium will no longer be the home for the San Diego Legion as the professional rugby team will be heading back to Torero Stadium at the University of San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Brayden Point's OT winner helps Lightning rally past Penguins, 3-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored at 3:58 of overtime and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied to beat the Pittsburgh Penguins 3-2 on Tuesday night. Point’s overtime winner was his 10th goal of the season. Anthony Cirelli scored his fifth goal of the season. Andrei Vasilevskiy stopped 17 shots for Tampa Bay.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The Jets are a dumpster fire
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Jets are a remarkable dumpster fire. Head coach Robert Saleh fired. GM Joe Douglas fired. Offensive coordinator Nathaniel Hackett demoted. They are a 3 and 8 football team and will most certainly miss the playoffs for the 14th consecutive year.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: BYU still controls own destiny for Big 12 Championship
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU is in a position it hasn't been in all season long -- trying to bounce back from a loss. The Cougars suffered their first defeat of the season Saturday night, a disappointing 17-13 loss to Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: Once Eberflus is gone, it's time to find a true culture setter
item.description: The Chicago Bears have lost three games in a row despite having a positive turnover margin, and need a head coach who can galvanize his roster to eat a punch early and rise to the occasion when the game is on the line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
